series_metadata.series_description: All records pertaining to the tax incentive agreement including, but not limited to, applications, agreements, amendments, supporting documentation, reports, correspondence, and other records filed with and related to the tax incentive agreement.

retention_rules.trigger_event: Paper: period specified electronic format ; Electronic: AGREEMENTS NOT SUBJECT CLAWBACK: three (3) years closeout or post-term reporting (if required) AGREEMENTS SUBJECT CLAWBACK: later of [a] three (3) years end of post-term reporting, or [b] two (2) years expiration of clawback period; . UNFUNDED/UNSUCCESSFUL APPLICATIONS: two (2) years date of denial, . Statutory or regulatory provisions applicable certain programs may affect retention of related records. In such cases, statutory or regulatory provisions shall take precedence over retention language set forth in this schedule. Records subject audit shall be further retained audit report is released and discrepancies addressed. LITIGATION HOLD: Any records subject a litigation hold must be retained hold is lifted by Legal Office, regardless of whether specified retention period has elapsed
